must_detect.matched_text:
Heads of Terms — Recommended Acquisition of Northmoor Capital plc by Wexford Harbour Group Ltd (UK)
Target: Northmoor Capital plc (Company No. 12345678, registered in England & Wales); Buyer: Wexford Harbour Group Ltd (Company No.: [to be provided]).
Structure: Possible offer by way of a scheme of arrangement under Part 26 Companies Act 2006; consideration mechanics to be finalised; no pricing terms are set out in this term sheet.
Status: Non-binding save for confidentiality, costs, exclusivity, and governing law; this summary reflects publicly announced intentions as of 02 February 2025.
Regulatory: The parties will comply with UK MAR, the Takeover Code, and applicable listing rules; notifications to the UK competent authority will be made via a regulatory information service.
Financing: Buyer expects to fund via committed facilities from Meridian & Brake Bank plc (fictional) and available cash; no underwriting announcement is made herein.
Employees/SMCR: No changes to employment terms are proposed at signing; any senior manager appointments will comply with SMCR; no individual personal data is requested at this stage.
Conditions: Customary shareholder approvals, court sanction (if a scheme), and clearances from the Albion Competition Office and the Prudential Markets Supervisor (fictional UK authorities).
Exclusivity/No-Shop: Target agrees to a six-week exclusivity period; no offer-related arrangements contravening the Takeover Code will be entered into.
Disclosure: No MNPI is included; references are limited to information already published via a regulatory news service (e.g., RNS 00/0000), for illustrative citation only.
Communications: Investor queries should go to investor-relations@wexfordharbour.example (role mailbox) or the public helpline 0800 000 000; do not contact unnamed deal team members directly.
KYC placeholders (do not submit real data): NI No.: QQ 12 34 56 C; UK Passport No.: 000000000; Bank IBAN: GB00 ZXZX 0000 0000 0000 00; Phone: 020 0000 0000; Registered office address: [insert UK address].
Listing/Admission: If a share consideration is used, any admission will be sought on the Londinium Growth Market (fictional UK exchange), subject to eligibility assessment.
Timetable: Expected signing following satisfactory diligence of public filings; longstop date and antitrust timetable to be agreed in definitive documentation.
Governing Law/Jurisdiction: This term sheet is governed by the laws of England and Wales; the courts of England and Wales have exclusive jurisdiction over binding provisions.

uncertain.reason: Indicates a data minimisation stance but phrased as a negation which may fall outside the rule to avoid negated controls.
All-zero passport number is a placeholder and may fail strict validation; detector behavior may vary.
QQ prefix denotes a dummy NIN used for testing; some engines may exclude it.
Role-based mailbox may not relate to an identifiable natural person under GDPR depending on context.
